calendar.matters:
Petition To Terminate Trusts For The Benefit Of M.C.Diffley And M.A. Holmes
Off Calendar May-13-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Randal Schmidt for Petitioners: Margaret Diffley and Maureen Holmes, no other appearances.

Mr. Schmidt stated to the Court the facts of the Petition to terminate trusts, the appraised value of the properties in the trusts, commissions and expenses associated to the sale.
The Court inquired of Susanne Mahoney ever exercise her power of appointment over the trusts.
After hearing the testimony by counsel, the Court took the matter under submission.

Comm. Sue Kaplan, CSR: LaVena Ward #7077, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, Bailiff: Deputy Gomez.

May 13, 2009, Petition to Terminate Trusts granted & signed by Comm. Kaplan.
